derivation: Ground-truth task-relevant interactive elements: every element inside the page's primary content region (<main>) that a CDP AX tree (Accessibility.getFullAXTree) reports with an interactive role or that is keyboard-focusable. Global site chrome (the <header> nav and <footer> nav) is intentionally excluded — it is identical across every page and is not part of this page's task. Derived from the fixture page's HTML/AX semantics, independent of tempo's own observation. See README.md 'Oracle derivation'.
